Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business registered on the Kenya Trade Hub.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the business.

ownerId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Business). The user who owns/manages this business.

registrationDate.description: The date the business was registered.

verificationStatus.description: The verification status of the business (e.g., pending, approved, rejected).

sector.description: The sector the business operates in.

latitude.description: The latitude of the business location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the business location.

contactEmail.description: The contact email address for the business.

contactPhone.description: The contact phone number for the business.

websiteUrl.description: The website URL for the business.

profileComplete.description: Whether the detailed business profile has been completed.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product listed on the Kenya Trade Hub.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

businessId.description: Reference to Business. (Relationship: Business 1:N Product). The business that owns/lists this product.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image of the product

currency.description: The currency of the product price.

approvalStatus.description: The approval status of the product (e.g., pending, approved, rejected).

hsCode.description: The Harmonized System (HS) code for the product.

Inquiry.title: Inquiry
Inquiry.description: Represents an inquiry sent by a buyer regarding a product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Inquiry entity.

buyerId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Inquiry). The user who sent the inquiry.

buyerEmail.description: The email of the user who sent the inquiry. Denormalized for easy access by the exporter.

businessId.description: Reference to Business. The business that will receive the inquiry. Denormalized for rule-based queries.

productId.description: Reference to Product. (Relationship: Product 1:N Inquiry). The product the inquiry is about.

message.description: The content of the inquiry message.

sentDate.description: The date the inquiry was sent.

status.description: The status of the inquiry (e.g., sent, received, responded).

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Kenya Trade Hub.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The email address of the user.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (e.g., buyer, exporter, admin).

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification sent to a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Notification). The user who received the notification.

type.description: The type of notification (e.g., account registration, inquiry received).

sentDate.description: The date the notification was sent.

isRead.description: Whether the notification has been read by the user.

emailSent.description: Whether an email notification has been sent

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a chat message between users.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

senderId.description: Reference to User. The user who sent the message.

recipientId.description: Reference to User. The user who received the message.

message.description: The content of the chat message.

sentDate.description: The date the message was sent.

inquiryId.description: Reference to Inquiry. Optional reference to the related inquiry.

NewsletterSubscriber.title: NewsletterSubscriber
NewsletterSubscriber.description: Represents a user who has subscribed to the newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

subscribedDate.description: The date and time when the user subscribed.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own profile.

/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificat.description: Stores notifications for each user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their notifications.

/businesses/{businessId}.description: Stores business profiles. Includes 'ownerId' for identifying the business owner.

/businesses/{businessId}/products/{produ.description: Stores products listed by a business. Inherits authorization from the business via the 'businessId'.

/inquiries/{inquiryId}.description: Stores inquiries sent by buyers regarding a product. Links buyer and product via 'buyerId' and 'productId'.

/chat_messages/{messageId}.description: Stores chat messages between users. Links sender, recipient and optionally, an inquiry.

/newsletter_subscribers/{subscriberId}.description: Stores email addresses of users who subscribed to the newsletter.
